summary:
The appropriate suture technique for a belt lipectomy involving abdominal flap plication is buried figure-of-eight sutures, as directly supported by retrieval results. Vertical mattress techniques are not applicable in this specific anatomical and procedural setting.  

\boxed{A}

\boxed{A}. Answer choice: D
